decision.architecture: One application-owned task, prompt, response, validation, fallback, and invocation contract shared by local and cloud transport adapters.

exact_source_contract: Current block and image paths bind API response schemas while ordinary text cleanup remains plain text.
Current summary storage has no production request, validation, lifecycle, or read-back owner.
Local and cloud generation share a compatibility chat-completions seam and preserve supplied response_format plumbing.
Application code owns record, block, queue, persistence identity, ordering, and timestamps.

bounded_executed.interpretation: Bounded transport, structure, context, and selected semantic evidence only; no general product admission.

runtime_unexecuted: full validation and attempt state machine

hard_invariants: The approved unit is a versioned task profile, not a model family.
Lab candidate or benchmark status never promotes a production profile automatically.
Exact model identity requires reconciled native key, compat ID, artifact digest, format, and verified quantization.
Context fit and memory fit remain separate gates.
A conservative estimate is never labeled exact or observed.
Local generation requires a post-materialization exact prompt-token gate unless the task explicitly allows conservative short-request mode.
Provider adapters do not select task, prompt, schema, translation target, validator, fallback, or product outcome.
Structured execution never silently downgrades to prompt-only JSON or plain text.
Request-specific block IDs stay out of positional const grammar and are validated after generation.
API-bound schema presence is not local post-response schema validation.
Full text remains authoritative and a summary remains derived and lossy.
full_text and document_summary are never silently aliased.
Microphone dictation and MODEL command modes do not share prompts, artifacts, fallback meaning, or clipboard failure behavior.
Rollback is not configuration-driven until kill switch, generation fence, accepted-attempt traceability, and readable versions exist.

decision_matrix.approved: Hard-filter approved task profiles by exact installed identity, required capability, request shape, and platform memory before ranking.
CUDA VRAM and host RAM are independent budgets; Apple unified memory is one pool; absolute and proportional reserves both apply.
One frozen application TaskRequest and one shared validator/fallback policy above transport-only adapters.
Compact generic closed schemas plus exact application-side identity and order checks.
Pre-load estimate, compatible materialization, exact loaded-instance prompt count, separately labeled overhead, and truncation-only output escalation under one call counter.
Keep authoritative full text; use immutable provenance-bound summary artifacts only where a manifest permits document_summary.
Classify anchored MODEL command before prompt selection and keep dictation cleanup and command execution as separate contracts.
Candidate dependency-light core and protocol-only ports consumed through host adapters.

planning_cycle_resolution: Recommendation and exact token planning use two phases: conservative candidate/context planning before load, followed by one exact gate after an approved local instance materializes. Exact no-fit causes deterministic replanning without a generation call.

classifier.trigger: ASCII MODEL case-insensitive at first non-whitespace position, optional horizontal whitespace, then required colon or full-width colon

migration_stages.name: owner_policy_closure
migration_stages.gate: Canonical vocabulary, catalog, telemetry, validator, output, headroom, and retention decisions are versioned and fail closed.

migration_stages.name: contract_kernel_and_boundaries
migration_stages.gate: Install/import and architecture tests prove one-way dependency, sanitized identifiers, and no lab-controller leakage.

migration_stages.name: task_manifests_and_fake_adapter_parity
migration_stages.gate: Messages, schema, budgets, task, and validation policy match across adapters except a closed transport allow-list.

migration_stages.name: validator_attempt_control_and_persistence
migration_stages.gate: Adversarial contracts, cumulative retry, cancellation, stale completion, failure injection, export, read-back, and rollback tests pass.

migration_stages.name: local_catalog_lifecycle_resource_and_token_planning
migration_stages.gate: Simulated transitions prove no unapproved selection, incompatible reuse, unsafe unload, estimate-as-exact promotion, or generation after exact no-fit.

migration_stages.name: structured_text_and_translation_shadow
migration_stages.gate: Task-specific transport, structure, semantics, latency, and fallback evidence pass without user-visible persistence.

migration_stages.name: summary_artifact_lifecycle
migration_stages.gate: Fake-client direct and hierarchical paths prove complete coverage, source retention, staleness, projection, export, resume, and read-back before summary consumption.

migration_stages.name: microphone_command_shadow
migration_stages.gate: Classifier, provider parity, strict rejection, cancellation, clipboard zero-side-effect, and artifact read-back pass while ordinary dictation remains unchanged.

migration_stages.name: task_canaries_and_legacy_retirement
migration_stages.gate: Per-contract kill switch, accepted-attempt traceability, readable versions, task thresholds, prompt disposition, and rollback are proven.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Approve policy records and schema vocabulary
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Owner decisions O1-O7 are versioned; schemas parse; unknown states fail closed.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Extract candidate core and ports
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Install/import, dependency direction, optional-dependency, and identifier sanitization tests pass.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement task definitions manifests and provider parity fixtures
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Logical messages, schema, budgets, task, and validation policy match across fake adapters except the transport allow-list.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement full validation and logical-attempt control plane
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Adversarial response and retry interaction matrix passes with immutable attempts and explicit outcomes.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Make persistence atomic or recoverable
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Failure injection proves deterministic recovery and exact accepted-attempt identity/order read-back.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement approved catalog and local recommendation adapters
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Missing, ambiguous, unsupported, and insufficient paths return typed unavailable with no unapproved fallback.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement local lifecycle and exact-token planner
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Offline integration proves compatible ownership, exact no-fit replan, truncation-only escalation, and cleanup.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement summary artifact lifecycle
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Fake-client direct/hierarchical lifecycle, complete coverage, staleness, FTS, export, resume, non-loss, and read-back pass; injection remains disabled.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Implement microphone command shadow path
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Classifier, parity, strict validation, cancellation, rollback, and zero clipboard side-effect tests pass.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Inventory and migrate legacy prompts
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Every custom prompt has native, legacy, or blocked disposition plus rollback metadata.

proposed_implementation_cards.title: Design separately authorized shadow and canary evidence plan
proposed_implementation_cards.done: Exact tasks, routes, denominators, privacy metrics, semantic review, stop gates, and rollback have owner approval before live execution.

non_claims: No model, task profile, context size, concurrency, memory threshold, or rollout percentage is approved.
No end-to-end host integration or host-product exact token count is established.
Apple MLX/Metal and multi-GPU recommendation safety are not established.
Structured microphone cleanup, command answers, translation, summary, and vision semantic quality are not admitted.
Complete local/cloud capability parity is not proven.
Transactional persistence, rollback, cache reuse, and production readiness are not proven.
This report does not authorize live inference, model loads/downloads, cloud calls, migration, commit, or push.
